tickets.description: Define shared TypeScript types for MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus, and Settings to be used across frontend and backend.
constraints: Export all types from the file
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus, and Settings types/interfaces matching PRD data structures
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify all types exist and match PRD fields and data types

tickets.description: Set up SQLite database schema with tables for categories, menu_items, orders, order_items, and settings using SQLAlchemy models.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports SQLAlchemy models for Category, MenuItem, Order, OrderItem, and Settings with appropriate fields and constraints
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify models match PRD schema and relationships

tickets.description: Create FastAPI app skeleton with SQLite database connection, including startup and shutdown events to connect and disconnect DB.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports FastAPI app instance with DB connection setup and teardown
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify app starts without errors and connects to SQLite DB

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for managing menu categories: list, create, update, delete, and reorder categories.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports APIRouter with endpoints for GET /categories, POST /categories, PUT /categories/{id}, DELETE /categories/{id}, and POST /categories/reorder
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify endpoints handle CRUD and reorder correctly with DB updates

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for managing menu items: list by category, create with photo upload, update, delete, and toggle availability.
constraints: Store photos in local uploads directory
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports APIRouter with endpoints for GET /menu-items, POST /menu-items (with photo), PUT /menu-items/{id}, DELETE /menu-items/{id}, and PATCH /menu-items/{id}/availability
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify photo upload saves file locally and DB updates accordingly

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for order management: submit order, list orders, update order status, and get daily sales summary.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports APIRouter with POST /orders, GET /orders, PATCH /orders/{id}/status, and GET /orders/sales-summary endpoints
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify orders can be created, listed, updated, and sales summary returns correct data

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for cart settings: get and update cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports APIRouter with GET /settings and PUT /settings endpoints
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings can be retrieved and updated

tickets.description: Set up WebSocket server in FastAPI for real-time order status updates and admin notifications with reconnect support.
constraints: Broadcast order status changes and new order notifications
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports WebSocket endpoint /ws that supports real-time messaging and reconnect logic
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify WebSocket connects, broadcasts messages, and handles disconnects

tickets.description: Configure FastAPI to serve the built React frontend statically from the / path alongside API and WebSocket endpoints.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports StaticFiles mount serving React build at root path
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify frontend loads correctly when visiting backend root URL

tickets.description: Create React UI for browsing menu categories and items grouped by category with photos, descriptions, and prices.
tickets.interaction_spec: User opens app, sees categories listed, taps a category to see items with photos, descriptions, and prices.
constraints: Use React functional components with hooks
Fetch categories and items from /api/categories and /api/menu-items
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports MenuBrowse component that fetches and displays categories and items grouped by category with photos and prices
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify categories and items display correctly with images and prices

tickets.description: Implement React cart component allowing users to add menu items with quantity controls, view cart contents, and modify quantities.
tickets.interaction_spec: User taps add button on menu item, item appears in cart, user can increase or decrease quantity or remove item.
constraints: Use React context or state hooks for cart state
Persist cart state in local storage
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports Cart component with add, remove, and quantity update functionality and persistent state
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify cart updates correctly and persists after page reload
qa_cmd: Add items to cart and reload page

tickets.description: Create React order submission form that sends cart contents to backend POST /orders and shows confirmation with order number.
tickets.interaction_spec: User reviews cart, taps submit order, form sends data, shows loading, then confirmation with order number.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports OrderSubmit component that submits order and displays confirmation or error
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify order submission works and confirmation displays order number
qa_cmd: Submit order and check backend DB

tickets.description: Implement React hook and component to connect to backend WebSocket for real-time order status updates and display current order status.
tickets.interaction_spec: After order submission, component connects to WebSocket, listens for status updates, and updates UI accordingly.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Hook manages WebSocket connection and state; component displays real-time order status
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify order status updates in real-time on UI when backend sends status changes
qa_cmd: Submit order and simulate status updates

tickets.description: Create admin login page with PIN input that validates against backend settings and stores auth state for admin panel access.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin enters PIN, submits, app verifies PIN with backend, on success redirects to admin panel, on failure shows error.
constraints: Store auth state in React context or local storage
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Page exports AdminLogin component that handles PIN input, validation, and auth state
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify correct PIN grants access and wrong PIN shows error
qa_cmd: Attempt login with correct and incorrect PIN

tickets.description: Build admin menu management UI to list, add, edit, delete, and toggle availability of menu items with photo upload.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views menu list, can add new item with photo, edit existing items, delete items, and toggle availability.
constraints: Use fetch API for CRUD endpoints
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Pages export components that fully manage menu items with photo upload and availability toggle
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify all menu CRUD operations work with photo uploads and availability toggling

tickets.description: Build admin category management UI to list, add, edit, delete, and reorder categories.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views categories list, can add new category, edit, delete, and drag to reorder categories.
constraints: Use fetch API for CRUD and reorder endpoints
Use drag-and-drop library or native HTML5 drag events
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Page exports component managing categories with full CRUD and reorder functionality
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify categories can be created, updated, deleted, and reordered with backend persistence

tickets.description: Create admin order management UI to view incoming orders with timestamps, update order status with one click, and see real-time new order notifications.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin sees list of orders, clicks to update status, receives real-time notifications for new orders via WebSocket.
constraints: Use fetch API for order list and status update
Use WebSocket hook for real-time notifications
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Page exports component displaying orders with status update buttons and real-time new order alerts
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify order list updates, status changes persist, and new order notifications appear in real-time
qa_cmd: Simulate new orders and update statuses

tickets.description: Create admin settings page to configure cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN with save functionality.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views current settings, edits fields, saves changes, and sees success or error feedback.
constraints: Use fetch API GET and PUT /api/settings
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Page exports component that loads, edits, and saves settings with feedback messages
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings load correctly and updates persist to backend
qa_cmd: Change settings and reload to verify
